**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Guiyang Xinhua Rubber & Plastic Co., Ltd. represents a stark case of dual-layer data falsification. First, the multinational 'Apple Inc.' facade has been entirely removed. Second, the official registry classifies this entity as a 'Complete Auto Manufacturer' (汽车整车制造), which is physically impossible. Tracking its historical footprints through displaced data reveals an origin in 1987 as a local township rubber factory ('Guiyang Rubber & Plastic Products Factory'). Today, it operates with a micro-capitalization of just 600,000 RMB and a skeletal, verified workforce of only 2 employees (recovered from 'organization_code'). Its authentic business scope is restricted to basic rubber/plastic goods, mold processing, and rudimentary auto parts. This extreme capital-to-workforce ratio (600k RMB / 2 people) definitively exposes it as either a defunct legacy shell or a micro-scale localized workshop, absolutely lacking any OEM auto manufacturing capacity.
